treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.subtitle: Participatory Budget
treasury.description: Every member votes on budget allocation. The median of all votes determines the official budget.
treasury.error_save_failed: Vote not saved — please try again
treasury.error_wallet_locked: Unlock your wallet to sign your vote
treasury.error_signature_required: PGP signature required — unlock your wallet first
treasury.not_eligible: You are not eligible to vote in this treasury.
treasury.not_eligible_hint: Check the required membership level to participate.
treasury.needs_update: New categories were added. Please update your allocation.
treasury.no_votes: No votes yet. Be the first to allocate the budget!

audit.title: Fiscal Audit
audit.description: Financial transparency dashboard for the designated auditor (Fiscal Único)
audit.not_auditor: You are not the designated auditor for this establishment.
audit.no_auditor_set: No auditor has been designated for this establishment.
audit.expenses_desc: All recorded expenses with receipt tracking
audit.sign_in: Sign in to view expense details
